title: Vision Goggles
description: This mod adds realistic night and thermal vision goggles to Minecraft with immersive shader effects. It features a customizable battery system that lets you use different items to charge your gear.
body:
# Vision Goggles

Vision Goggles is a high-fidelity tactical equipment mod for Minecraft that introduces a comprehensive suite of modular eyewear designed to redefine environmental interaction. Built with a focus on immersive visuals and    
hardware simulation, this mod provides essential utility for combat, exploration, and specialized operations.

## Core Mechanics and Customization

The centerpiece of the mod is the Modification Station, a high-tech workbench where players customize their Modular Goggles. Using an intuitive interface, you can install specialized Utility Modules to upgrade your vision  
capabilities.

## The Power & Durability System

Your equipment is powerful, but not invincible.
 * Battery Management: A dedicated HUD element provides real-time monitoring of energy levels. Recharging is done via compatible power items.
 * Visual Durability: Goggles absorb damage during combat. As durability drops below 30%, cracks appear on your screen, dynamically tinted to match your active vision mode.
 * Critical Failure: At critical damage levels (>85%), the system suffers from digital artifacts and visual glitches.

## Advanced Vision Modes

Vision Goggles employs a custom rendering pipeline to provide immersive visual experiences.

 * Tactical Night Vision (NVG): A light-amplification system for navigation in total darkness. Includes selectable color themes: Classic Green, White Phosphor, and Digital Cyan.
  ![Nvg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d361ecd6ca081da13315028a7c15f5ff57c7f603.png)

![NVG Phosphor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b06c4da4211595a814538d5a4c2fb5460560651e_0.webp)

![NVG Cyan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46cb1192b932e472f0491498deafdf7ddbfc5840_0.webp)
 * Thermal Imaging: A high-contrast blue filter designed for navigating dark and hostile environments.
  ![Thermal Goggles no mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a65e5cdb09670dc3c9cef121d343e3012eda1038_0.webp)
  ![Thermal Goggles with mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7aa70d5ea79dc3c0d701f3d5dec48bdfb6cfd78_0.webp)
 * Biometric Scanner: A tactical orange-tinted mode optimized for clarity.
  ![Bio Goggles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bc437ab58604e7aa90b02f567203f1c7a67ff6e_0.webp)
 * Hydro-Stabilization: A specialized module that removes underwater fog and applies a cyan tint, providing crystal-clear vision under the surface.
  ![Hidro Goggles Outside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df4219c71974116c1bba804ea8a55f9806ce539a_0.webp)![Hidro Goggles Underwater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e56d696b2e32b24246f7f845b8cbb0549fae4892_0.webp)

## Tactical Information HUD

A completely redesigned modular HUD projects vital data directly onto your retina:
 * Vital Monitor: Displays exact Saturation levels (Sat: 14.0) and real-time Coordinates (with auto Nether/Overworld conversion).
 * Environment Module: A diving computer that calculates real-time oxygen levels, accounting for Respiration enchantments to show exactly how many seconds of air remain.

## Design and Inspiration

The 3D modeling and visual design of the goggles in this mod are inspired by the work found in the Survival Instinct mod by Tohigorosu.

## Localization

It is fully localized in:
 * English, Spanish, German, French, Italian, Polish, Portuguese (Brazil), and Russian.

## Technical Requirements

Vision Goggles is built using the Architectury API for native cross-platform support.
Dependencies:
 1. Architectury API
 2. Cloth Config API
 3. Curios API (Forge) Accessories (Fabric)
 4. Mod Menu (Fabric) (Optional)
